CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.current_app_role()
 RETURNS text
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
  select coalesce((
    select lower(role)
    from public.profiles
    where id = auth.uid()
      and is_active = true
    limit 1
  ), 'none')
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_user_role()
 RETURNS text
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE
AS $function$
  select role
  from profiles
  where id = auth.uid();
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.handle_new_user_profile()
 RETURNS trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
begin
  insert into public.profiles (id, email, full_name, role, is_active)
  values (
    new.id,
    new.email,
    coalesce(new.raw_user_meta_data->>'full_name', new.email),
    'seller',
    true
  )
  on conflict (id) do nothing;

  return new;
end;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.set_order_totals()
 RETURNS trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
declare
  v_order_id uuid;
begin
  v_order_id := coalesce(new.order_id, old.order_id);

  update public.orders o
     set subtotal = coalesce((
           select sum(oi.subtotal)
           from public.order_items oi
           where oi.order_id = v_order_id
         ), 0),
         grand_total = coalesce((
           select sum(oi.subtotal)
           from public.order_items oi
           where oi.order_id = v_order_id
         ), 0)
         - coalesce(o.discount_amount, 0)
         + coalesce(o.shipping_amount, 0)
         + coalesce(o.tax_amount, 0),
         total = coalesce((
           select sum(oi.subtotal)
           from public.order_items oi
           where oi.order_id = v_order_id
         ), 0)
         - coalesce(o.discount_amount, 0)
         + coalesce(o.shipping_amount, 0)
         + coalesce(o.tax_amount, 0),
         updated_at = now()
   where o.id = v_order_id;

  return null;
end;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.set_purchase_order_totals()
 RETURNS trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
declare
  v_purchase_order_id uuid;
begin
  v_purchase_order_id := coalesce(new.purchase_order_id, old.purchase_order_id);

  update public.purchase_orders po
     set subtotal = coalesce((
           select sum(poi.subtotal)
           from public.purchase_order_items poi
           where poi.purchase_order_id = v_purchase_order_id
         ), 0),
         total = coalesce((
           select sum(poi.subtotal)
           from public.purchase_order_items poi
           where poi.purchase_order_id = v_purchase_order_id
         ), 0)
         - coalesce(po.discount_amount, 0)
         + coalesce(po.shipping_amount, 0)
         + coalesce(po.tax_amount, 0),
         updated_at = now()
   where po.id = v_purchase_order_id;

  return null;
end;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.sync_inventory_from_order_active_flag()
 RETURNS trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
begin
  -- Solo actuar cuando cambia is_active
  if coalesce(old.is_active, true) is not distinct from coalesce(new.is_active, true) then
    return new;
  end if;

  -- Si pasa de true -> false: devolver stock
  if coalesce(old.is_active, true) = true
     and coalesce(new.is_active, true) = false then

    insert into public.inventory_movements (
      user_id,
      product_id,
      variant_id,
      warehouse_id,
      point_of_sale_id,
      movement_type,
      qty,
      reference_type,
      reference_id,
      notes
    )
    select
      new.user_id,
      oi.product_id,
      oi.variant_id,
      new.warehouse_id,
      new.point_of_sale_id,
      'SALE',
      oi.qty,
      'ORDER_SOFT_DELETE_STOCK',
      new.id,
      'Soft delete order - stock revert'
    from public.order_items oi
    where oi.order_id = new.id;

    return new;
  end if;

  -- Si pasa de false -> true: volver a descontar stock
  if coalesce(old.is_active, true) = false
     and coalesce(new.is_active, true) = true then

    insert into public.inventory_movements (
      user_id,
      product_id,
      variant_id,
      warehouse_id,
      point_of_sale_id,
      movement_type,
      qty,
      reference_type,
      reference_id,
      notes
    )
    select
      new.user_id,
      oi.product_id,
      oi.variant_id,
      new.warehouse_id,
      new.point_of_sale_id,
      'SALE',
      -oi.qty,
      'ORDER_SOFT_DELETE_STOCK',
      new.id,
      'Reactivate order - stock apply'
    from public.order_items oi
    where oi.order_id = new.id;

    return new;
  end if;

  return new;
end;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.sync_inventory_from_order_item()
 RETURNS trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
declare
  v_order_new public.orders%rowtype;
  v_order_old public.orders%rowtype;
begin
  if tg_op = 'INSERT' then
    select *
      into v_order_new
      from public.orders
     where id = new.order_id;

    -- Solo impacta stock si la orden esta activa
    if coalesce(v_order_new.is_active, true) then
      insert into public.inventory_movements (
        user_id,
        product_id,
        variant_id,
        warehouse_id,
        point_of_sale_id,
        movement_type,
        qty,
        reference_type,
        reference_id,
        notes
      )
      values (
        v_order_new.user_id,
        new.product_id,
        new.variant_id,
        v_order_new.warehouse_id,
        v_order_new.point_of_sale_id,
        'SALE',
        -new.qty,
        'ORDER_ITEM_STOCK',
        new.id,
        'Auto stock sync - insert'
      );
    end if;

    return new;
  end if;

  if tg_op = 'DELETE' then
    select *
      into v_order_old
      from public.orders
     where id = old.order_id;

    -- Solo revierte stock si la orden estaba activa
    if coalesce(v_order_old.is_active, true) then
      insert into public.inventory_movements (
        user_id,
        product_id,
        variant_id,
        warehouse_id,
        point_of_sale_id,
        movement_type,
        qty,
        reference_type,
        reference_id,
        notes
      )
      values (
        v_order_old.user_id,
        old.product_id,
        old.variant_id,
        v_order_old.warehouse_id,
        v_order_old.point_of_sale_id,
        'SALE',
        old.qty,
        'ORDER_ITEM_STOCK',
        old.id,
        'Auto stock sync - delete'
      );
    end if;

    return old;
  end if;

  if tg_op = 'UPDATE' then
    select *
      into v_order_old
      from public.orders
     where id = old.order_id;

    select *
      into v_order_new
      from public.orders
     where id = new.order_id;

    if old.qty is distinct from new.qty
       or old.product_id is distinct from new.product_id
       or old.variant_id is distinct from new.variant_id
       or old.order_id is distinct from new.order_id
    then
      -- Revierte el item viejo solo si la orden vieja estaba activa
      if coalesce(v_order_old.is_active, true) then
        insert into public.inventory_movements (
          user_id,
          product_id,
          variant_id,
          warehouse_id,
          point_of_sale_id,
          movement_type,
          qty,
          reference_type,
          reference_id,
          notes
        )
        values (
          v_order_old.user_id,
          old.product_id,
          old.variant_id,
          v_order_old.warehouse_id,
          v_order_old.point_of_sale_id,
          'SALE',
          old.qty,
          'ORDER_ITEM_STOCK',
          old.id,
          'Auto stock sync - revert old'
        );
      end if;

      -- Aplica el item nuevo solo si la orden nueva esta activa
      if coalesce(v_order_new.is_active, true) then
        insert into public.inventory_movements (
          user_id,
          product_id,
          variant_id,
          warehouse_id,
          point_of_sale_id,
          movement_type,
          qty,
          reference_type,
          reference_id,
          notes
        )
        values (
          v_order_new.user_id,
          new.product_id,
          new.variant_id,
          v_order_new.warehouse_id,
          v_order_new.point_of_sale_id,
          'SALE',
          -new.qty,
          'ORDER_ITEM_STOCK',
          new.id,
          'Auto stock sync - apply new'
        );
      end if;
    end if;

    return new;
  end if;

  return coalesce(new, old);
end;
$function$
